notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Chandler Simpson scores. Taylor Walls to 3rd. Yandy Díaz to 2nd. Fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Chandler Simpson scores. Taylor Walls to 3rd. Yandy Díaz to 2nd. Fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario flies out to center fielder Cedric Mullins.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario grounds out to pitcher Cole Sulser.
